CheckTitle: AMI block public access is enabled at the account level
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices
Description: AMI block public access configuration is assessed to see whether public sharing of AMIs is blocked in the account and region.
Risk: Without blocking public access, AMIs could be accidentally or maliciously shared publicly, potentially exposing sensitive data, keys, and configurations.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure AMI block public access is enabled in the account.
